description: The GYM observatory's SeisComP system has station inventory and archived broadband waveform data from the 2024 Noto Peninsula M7.5 earthquake (2024-01-01 07:10:09 UTC) but no automatic processing has ever been configured. Set up and validate a fully functional automated earthquake detection pipeline. Configure scautopick module bindings with a bandpass filter appropriate for teleseismic P-wave detection on all stations that have waveform data in the SDS archive. Run an offline playback of the 2024-001 data. Verify the pipeline produced correct results by writing a validation script at /home/ga/validate_pipeline.py that queries the SeisComP MySQL database for all automatic picks and origins generated by the playback, checks that P-phase picks were detected, computes the epicentral distance from each picking station to the nearest automatic origin, and saves a structured validation report to /home/ga/pipeline_report.json containing: pick_count, origin_count, origin_lat, origin_lon, origin_depth_km, origin_time, and a station_picks array with code, pick_time, and distance_km per entry.
